synopsis: collects various material from Marvel’s UK comics and UK Star Wars magazines. Includes Star Wars Weekly #60, 94-99, 104-115; Empire Strikes Back Monthly #149, 151, 153-157; Star Wars Monthly 159; Ewoks Annual 1989; Star Wars: The Official Collectors’ Magazine; Material From Pizzazz 10-16; Uk Exclusive Covers, Pinups, Articles
title: Star Wars: The Marvel UK Omnibus
